positive: A stylized, whimsical woodland scene silhouette featuring friendly, stylized woodland creatures (foxes, rabbits, owls, bears) interacting with oversized, delicate flora. The composition must be centered and highly detailed, designed to be printed on apparel. Use a deep indigo and forest green color palette against a crisp, off-white background. The style should be reminiscent of detailed linocut or sophisticated botanical illustration, emphasizing clear, bold black outlines and a strong, graphic silhouette effect. Overhead, the light should suggest a dappled forest glow, enhancing the contrast between the subjects and the background. Intricate negative space utilization is key. Minimalist yet rich in detail.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, jpeg artifacts, noise, bad anatomy, low detail, copyright, monochrome only
